case_title: KEATING MAUREEN VS WELLS FARGIO BANK NA CARL REICHARDT CEO

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO CARL REICHARDT (WELLS FARGO BANK) RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $838.57 FILED BY KEATING MAUREEN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGIO BANK NA CARL REICHARDT CEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
